name: mlm-dx
description: MLM-DX monorepo with Next.js frontend and Cloudflare Workers backend

scripts.build:local: npm run build:worker:local && npm run build:web
scripts.deploy:all:prod: npm run deploy:worker:prod && npm run deploy:web:prod
scripts.db:create:local: echo 'Local D1 database is created automatically when running wrangler dev'
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:worker
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=apps/web && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/worker
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/.next apps/worker/.wrangler
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=apps/web && npm install --workspace=apps/worker
scripts.start:prod: npm run build:local && npm run deploy:all:prod
